description: Phase WX-K.2 (2026-05-20) — minimal recipe for the `refine` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Fires when the user provides content (paste, attachment, URL) AND asks for a transformation (translate / summarize / rewrite / extract / OCR / format). Same shape as aiwizard-answer.json + the user-references layer that carries the attached content. Body size <3KB + attached content. If no content is attached, the user-references layer returns nil and the recipe degenerates to answer-mode behavior (same context shape as aiwizard-answer.json). Deliberately excludes wisdom packs, web-components, capability packs, and all code-gen layers.
